findings: SOA 参数揭示 TLD 运营策略差异: refresh/retry/expire 跨区域有数量级差异
ch  : refresh 8.5h | retry 1.9h | expire 16.3d | min 19651s | primary_ns 28895
ee  : refresh 3.5h | retry 6.0h | expire 18.4d | min 12060s | primary_ns 4315
fr  : refresh 14.1h | retry 1.3h | expire 21.3d | min 14527s | primary_ns 29723
gov : refresh 41.8h | retry 1.0h | expire 12.6d | min 14560s | primary_ns 3045
li  : refresh 16.4h | retry 1.3h | expire 14.8d | min 24220s | primary_ns 5640
nu  : refresh 18.2h | retry 1.1h | expire 11.9d | min 45672s | primary_ns 6946
